news.summary: In New York, research from KBRA reveals a slowdown in April retail sales and employment growth due to trade policy uncertainty, leading to cautious consumer spending and market instability. Recent reports highlight stable retail sales and job growth in March amidst fluctuating trade tensions affecting markets. KBRA also examines the potential effects of tariffs on municipal credit. Stay updated with Van Hesser’s insights on credit through KBRA's weekly podcast. KBRA, a leading credit rating agency, continues to analyze these trends.
news.headline: KBRA research shows retail sales slumped in April due to trade policy uncertainty, unsettling consumers.

news.summary: Midway through Thursday's trading session, U.S. stocks saw gains, with the Dow Jones index increasing by approximately 0.2%. The Dow was up by 0.17% to 41,932.94, while the NASDAQ climbed by 0.66% to 18,997.89, and the S&P 500 rose by 0.20% to 5,856.28. Communication services shares experienced a 1.2% increase, while utilities stocks saw a 1.9% decline. Initial jobless claims in the U.S. decreased by 2,000 from the previous week to 227,000 in the week ending May 17, surpassing market estimates of 230,000. In specific equities trading, Vigil Neuroscience, Inc. (NASDAQ: VIGL) shares surged by 242% to $7.91 following Sanofi's announcement of acquiring the company for about $600 million. Additionally, Navitas Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ: NVTS) witnessed a 130% surge to $4.3988 after NVIDIA's selection of the company.
news.headline: Dow gains 0.17% to 41,932.94, NASDAQ rises 0.66% to 18,997.89, S&P 500 up 0.20% to 5,856.28; US initial jobless claims fall to 227,000.

news.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) saw a significant drop in its stock price following the release of its fiscal first-quarter 2025 results. The company reported total revenue of $1.73 billion, marking a 4.2% increase from the previous year and surpassing Wall Street's projected $1.67 billion. Comparable brand revenue also showed growth, rising by 3.4% year over year. However, the adjusted earnings per share of $1.56 fell short of the analyst consensus of $1.76. The retailer reported a gross margin of 44.3%, a decline of 360 basis points from the prior year. This included a 300-basis-point benefit from a freight adjustment in the same quarter of 2024. The adjusted gross margin also decreased by 60 basis points compared to the previous year, mainly due to a 220-basis-point decrease in merchandise margins, partially offset by 120 basis points of supply chain efficiencies. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.
news.headline: Williams-Sonoma absorbs tariff costs, revenue soars to $1.73B, up 4.2%; misses EPS at $1.56 vs est. $1.76. Gross margin down to 44.3%.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Dallas, the directors at Lennox, a prominent company in energy-efficient climate control solutions listed on NYSE as LII, sanctioned a 13% rise in the quarterly dividend. This increase takes the dividend from $1.15 to $1.30 per share of common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on July 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded as...
news.headline: Lennox raises quarterly dividend by 13% to $1.30 per share, payable July 15, 2025, to stockholders.

news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland, on May 22, 2025, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) provided an update on its ongoing discussions to acquire IC’ALPS SAS ("IC’ALPS") in a deal that would involve purchasing all of its shares and voting rights. IC’ALPS is a specialist in designing and supplying Application-Specific Integrated Circuits ("ASICs") and is headquartered in Grenoble, France. SEALSQ, a company focusing on Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, is in exclusive negotiations for this acquisition. No financial terms were disclosed regarding the deal.
news.headline: SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) to acquire 100% of IC'ALPS, an ASIC design specialist in Grenoble, France.

news.summary: Barclays analyst David Strauss has started covering Intuitive Machines (NASDAQ: LUNR) with an Equal-Weight rating and a price target of $13. The rating indicates positivity towards the company's various growth opportunities, tempered by concerns regarding government funding, competition within the industry, and operational hurdles. Strauss believes that Intuitive Machines stands to benefit from NASA's increasing reliance on private sector collaborators. The company holds a strategic position in NASA's initiatives for lunar exploration, contributing to lunar landers, data transfer, and surface operations. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Intuitive Machines aims for $500M revenue by 2028, targets positive EBITDA in 2026, says analyst.

Cole Haan's foray into golf apparel signifies a strategic expansion for the brand, which is expected to attract a significant audience of sports enthusiasts and fashion-forward consumers. Stay tuned for more updates on this exclusive launch from Cole Haan.
news.headline: Cole Haan partners with Catapult Group to launch performance apparel; Golf Apparel debut in Spring 2026.

news.summary: LAS VEGAS--The recently renovated Go Pool at Flamingo Las Vegas is set to kick off the pool season with a $20 million upgrade. The revamped multi-pool complex, now exclusively for guests 21 and older, provides an ideal setting for lively parties. Encompassing approximately 1.5 acres, Go Pool boasts five diverse pools and attractions. Noteworthy features include the Main Pool, highlighted by a swim-up bar and four TVs under a spacious canopy. Guests can now enjoy this enhanced pool experience.
news.headline: New Go Pool at Flamingo Las Vegas opens after $20M transformation, spanning 1.5 acres with 5 pools and a swim-up bar. Guests 21+ only.

news.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) has revealed that World of Hyatt members now have access to The Standard hotels, renowned for their unique cultural experiences. Recognized for over 25 years for hosting dynamic events like DJ performances, live music, art installations, and fashion week shows, The Standard is offering distinctive stays for World of Hyatt members. This partnership allows members to immerse themselves in the creative world of The Standard, expanding their opportunities for unforgettable experiences.
news.headline: World of Hyatt members can now earn and redeem at The Standard hotels, known for cultural vibrancy and unique experiences.

news.summary: Beijing, on May 22, 2025, a recent action plan has been implemented to ensure the stability of foreign investment. Despite the significant growth of China's domestic market entities over the past 40 years of reform and opening-up, the necessity of foreign investment is being questioned.
news.headline: China introduces new action plan to stabilize foreign investment despite strong domestic market growth after 40 years of reform.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) reached a record high of $111,903 recently, as stated by Anthony Scaramucci of Skybridge Capital. The surge was attributed to a combination of advancements in regulation and economic concerns. Scaramucci emphasized bipartisan support for U.S. crypto legislation and the increasing global interest in holding Bitcoin as a sovereign reserve. Key legislation mentioned includes the GENIUS Act and a stablecoin bill currently awaiting approval. This bipartisan approach is seen as a positive sign for institutional acceptance of Bitcoin. This news demonstrates the growing influence of regulatory developments and macroeconomic factors on the cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: Bitcoin hit new all-time high of $111,903, driven by regulatory progress and global interest in reserves, according to Scaramucci.

news.summary: A collaboration between the Avondale Development Corporation and altafiber has resulted in the provision of complimentary high-speed WiFi in the Reading Road business precinct in Cincinnati. This initiative aims to stimulate economic progress and enhance the living standards of Avondale inhabitants. altafiber has successfully established public WiFi connectivity in various establishments on the business stretch of Reading Road, including the Urban League of Greater Southwestern Ohio and the Cincinnati NAACP.
news.headline: Avondale Development Corp. teams up with altafiber to offer free public high-speed WiFi along Reading Road business district.

This direction aims to drive progress and enhance efficiency, laying the foundation for accelerated growth and development in the region. This initiative presents a significant opportunity for Henan Province, where it could potentially contribute to shaping the future of Chinese modernization efforts.
news.headline: Xi Jinping emphasizes confidence in high-quality development during Henan visit. Focus on modernization.

news.summary: In Mandeville, Louisiana, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and Bonvenu Bank (Bonvenu) held an event to mark the distribution of $351,264 in FHLB Dallas FORTIFIED and Disaster Rebuilding Assistance (DRA) grants. The occasion coincided with the opening of Bonvenu's new branch. These funds, facilitated by Bonvenu as a member of FHLB Dallas, are earmarked for repairing low-income households in Louisiana. Terri Gage, the president, was present at the event.
news.headline: FHLB Dallas and Bonvenu Bank donate $351k to Habitat for Humanity St. Tammany West for repairs assist low-income families.

news.summary: In Brookfield, Wisconsin, on May 22, 2025, Bitcoin Media World, affiliated with Bitcoin Mining World, has revealed a collaboration with Jordan Guess from Bitment to introduce The Bitcoin Suits Podcast monthly. This partnership aims to offer financial education to a wide audience through an engaging podcast format.

news.summary: The U.S. House of Representatives approved a significant tax and spending bill, projected to increase the federal deficit by over $3 trillion between 2025 and 2034 according to the Congressional Budget Office. The legislation's fiscal impact will peak around 2027 with temporary spending programs and tax cuts. Analysts warn of the dangers of such a sharp increase in debt, given the already unsustainable trajectory of U.S. finances. Spencer Hakimian predicts $4 trillion annual deficits and permanent emergency-style stimulus in the near future. The bill's passage has raised concerns and led to Moody's recent U.S. credit rating downgrade. Lawmakers are urged to revisit the bill and develop one that reduces deficits. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: US House passes tax-and-spending bill increasing federal deficit by $3 trillion; fiscal impacts to peak around 2027. Wall Street analysts warn of unsustainable debt trajectory, calling for deficit reduction. Market may witness permanent stimulus and $4 trillion annual deficits in the future. Moody's credit rating downgrade cited as a concern.

news.summary: The news article discusses the mixed results of US jobless claims and their effect on risk assets like Bitcoin and stocks. Despite concerns in the bond market, Bitcoin and stocks remain stable at the start of the Wall Street trading session with Bitcoin focusing on $111,000. BTC price volatility is cooling in line with stocks as the latest US macroeconomic data shows conflicting labor market resilience and inflation trends. While initial jobless claims were below expectations at 227,000, continuing claims exceeded by 13,000. The market maintained prior levels, leading to bullish conclusions over market sentiment. Interestingly, Bitcoin's behavior at its all-time high of $111,000 shows low volatility and a curious lack of profit-taking, hinting at a potential bigger move in the future. Onchain analytics platform Glassnode flagged steady hodler resolve despite high profitability. The article emphasizes that investment decisions should be made after conducting thorough research due to the risks involved.
news.headline: BTC price targets $112K amid upbeat market sentiment despite mixed US jobless data. Low volatility and lack of profit-taking noted. Market remains stable even with concerns over bond market.
